---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or an expansion of the extended spec
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you trying to do?**
The underlying use case — not just the feature itself.

**Where would this live?**
The spec (`docs/spec/teamapi-extended-v1.md` + `packages/schema`), the org-graph engine
(`packages/core`), a specific interface (CLI/REST API/MCP server/chat), or something else?

**Proposed shape**
If this affects the schema, a rough sketch of the new field(s) and their types is the most useful
thing you can include.

**Alternatives considered**
